introSection: Mine Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mtatsminda Park in Tbilisi, Georgia. It is a Big Apple-style roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Sartori Rides.
fullText:
Mine Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Mtatsminda Park in Tbilisi, Georgia. It is a Big Apple-style roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Sartori Rides.

Purple track and orange supports.

"Mine train" shaped train.
